lenses.description: A telephoto T2.0 prime in the Leitz Summicron-C set for Super 35, reaching into tighter compression for portraits, detail and distant subjects. It keeps the set's high resolution and low distortion with telecentric even illumination. Natural, dimensional skin tones and a gentle roll-off keep talent looking natural, with a soft, naturalistic bokeh, colour-matched to intercut with the Summilux-C primes. PL mount, a 95mm front and matched gear positions keep it consistent with the rest of the set.

lenses.description: The widest lens in the Leitz Summicron-C set, a T2.0 ultra-wide for Super 35 that takes in large spaces, tight interiors and dramatic perspective. Like the rest of the set it is compact and light, telecentric for even illumination into the corners, with low distortion and high resolution. It carries the Summicron-C rendering of natural, dimensional skin tones, a gentle focus roll-off and a naturalistic bokeh, colour-matched to intercut cleanly with the faster Summilux-C primes. PL mount, a 95mm front and matched gear positions keep it consistent across the set.

lenses.description: A very wide T2.0 prime in the Leitz Summicron-C set for Super 35, a touch less extreme than the 15mm while still opening up a scene. It shares the set's compact, lightweight build, telecentric even illumination and low distortion, with high resolution across the frame. Skin tones read natural and dimensional with a gentle roll-off, and the bokeh is soft and naturalistic. Colour-matched to the Summilux-C primes, it intercuts with them on the PL mount with a shared 95mm front and matched gears.

lenses.description: A wide-angle T2.0 prime in the Leitz Summicron-C set for Super 35, useful for environmental framing while keeping subjects natural. It holds the set's low distortion and high resolution with telecentric, even corner illumination. The Summicron-C look carries through in natural skin tones, a gentle focus fall-off and a soft, naturalistic bokeh, colour-matched to intercut with the Summilux-C primes. Compact and light, with the shared PL mount, 95mm front and matched gears for fast changes.

lenses.description: A wide standard T2.0 prime in the Leitz Summicron-C set for Super 35, a versatile focal length between establishing and character work. Like its siblings it is compact and light, telecentric for even illumination, with low distortion and clean high resolution. It renders natural, dimensional skin tones with a gentle roll-off and a naturalistic bokeh, and is colour-matched to intercut with the faster Summilux-C primes. PL mount, a 95mm front and matched focus and iris gears keep it interchangeable across the set.

PL mount, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it interchangeable across the set.

lenses.description: A short-telephoto T2.0 prime in the Leitz Summicron-C set for Super 35, well suited to portraits and tighter singles with flattering compression. It keeps the set's low distortion and high resolution with telecentric even illumination. Natural, dimensional skin tones and a gentle roll-off give faces depth, with a soft, naturalistic bokeh, colour-matched to the Summilux-C primes for clean intercutting. Compact and light, with the shared PL mount, 95mm front and matched gears.

lenses.description: A telephoto T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, reaching into tighter compression for portraits, detail and distant subjects while holding the fast stop. It keeps the set's high resolution and low distortion with telecentric even illumination and virtually no focus breathing. Warm, creamy skin tones and a gentle roll-off keep talent looking natural, with a naturalistic bokeh rather than a clinical one. It shares the titanium PL mount, 95mm front and matched gears of the rest of the Summilux-C set.

lenses.description: The widest lens in the Leitz Summilux-C set, a T1.4 ultra-wide for Super 35 that opens up tight interiors and sweeping establishing shots. Like the rest of the set it stays compact and light for its speed, with low distortion, telecentric even illumination into the corners and virtually no focus breathing. It carries the Summilux-C signature of high resolution with warm, creamy skin tones and a gentle focus roll-off, and a naturalistic rather than clinical bokeh from purely spherical optics. A titanium PL mount, shared 95mm front and matched gear positions keep it interchangeable with the other focal lengths.

lenses.description: A very wide T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, a step less extreme than the 16mm while still taking in a broad field. It shares the set's compact build, low distortion and even, telecentric illumination, with focus breathing kept effectively to nothing. Skin tones stay warm and creamy with a soft focus fall-off, and the naturalistic bokeh comes from spherical optics rather than aspheres. Titanium PL mount, a 95mm front and matched focus and iris gears keep it consistent with the rest of the set.

lenses.description: A standard-length T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, one of the most reached-for focal lengths for both wider character shots and general coverage. It carries the set's high resolution and low distortion with telecentric, even corner illumination and almost no breathing. The Summilux-C rendering of warm, creamy skin tones and a gentle focus fall-off is on full display, with a naturalistic bokeh from spherical optics. Compact for T1.4, it shares the titanium PL mount, 95mm front and matched gear positions of the set.

lenses.description: A normal T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, a natural, unexaggerated perspective sitting comfortably between the 35 and 50. It holds the set's high resolution, low distortion and telecentric even illumination with virtually no focus breathing. Skin tones stay warm and creamy with a soft focus roll-off, and the bokeh reads as naturalistic. Titanium PL mount, a 95mm front and matched focus and iris gears keep it consistent with the rest of the Summilux-C lenses.

lenses.description: A standard-to-short-telephoto T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, a classic choice for dialogue and portraiture. Like the set it is compact and fast, with high resolution, low distortion, even telecentric illumination and effectively no breathing. The warm, creamy Summilux-C skin tones and gentle focus fall-off flatter faces, with a naturalistic bokeh from spherical optics. It shares the titanium PL mount, 95mm front and matched gears for quick, balanced lens changes.

lenses.description: A short-telephoto T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, well suited to portraits and tighter singles with flattering compression. It keeps the set's high resolution and low distortion with telecentric even illumination and almost no focus breathing. Warm, creamy skin tones and a gentle roll-off give faces a natural, dimensional quality, with a naturalistic bokeh. Compact for its speed, it shares the titanium PL mount, 95mm front and matched gear positions of the set.

lenses.description: A short-telephoto T1.4 prime in the Leitz Summilux-C set for Super 35, a step longer than the 65 for portraits and isolated subjects. It holds the set's high resolution, low distortion, telecentric even illumination and effectively absent breathing. The Summilux-C signature carries through in warm, creamy skin tones, a soft focus fall-off and a naturalistic bokeh from spherical optics. Titanium PL mount, a 95mm front and matched focus and iris gears keep it interchangeable across the set.

lenses.description: A short-telephoto T2.2 prime in the Leitz Thalia 65 set for large format, well suited to portraits and tighter framing on 65-format and full-frame sensors. Based on Leica's S medium-format glass, it carries the Thalia character of gentle, lower-contrast rendering, warm natural skin tones and a layered focus fall-off that gives faces depth and dimensionality. The always-round 15-blade iris gives a bokeh full of character. PL and LPL swappable mounts with /i metadata, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it interchangeable across the set.

lenses.description: A telephoto T2.6 prime in the Leitz Thalia 65 set for large format, and the longest of the three 1:2 macro lenses, ready for tight product and close-up work without diopters. Based on Leica's S medium-format glass, it renders the Thalia look of gentle, lower-contrast character, warm natural skin tones and a layered roll-off that pulls the subject out of the background. The 15-blade iris stays round through every stop for a characterful bokeh. PL and LPL swappable mounts with /i metadata, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it consistent across the set.

Based on Leica's S medium-format glass, it carries the Thalia character of gentle, lower-contrast rendering, warm natural skin tones and a layered focus fall-off that adds depth and separates the subject. The always-round 15-blade iris gives a bokeh full of character. PL and LPL swappable mounts with /i metadata, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it interchangeable across the set.

lenses.description: The widest lens in the Leitz Thalia 65 set and its newest addition, a T3.6 ultra-wide for large format that covers sensors up to the ARRI Alexa 65. Based on Leica's S medium-format glass, it carries a vintage-inspired character without the drawbacks of true vintage glass: lower contrast than the Summilux-C or Summicron-C, a gentle painterly rendering and a layered focus roll-off that pulls the subject out of the background. Skin tones are natural and warm with subtle highlight bloom, and the 15-blade iris stays round through every stop for a bokeh full of character. PL and LPL swappable mounts with /i metadata, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it consistent across the set.

lenses.description: The Thalia-T 90mm, a T2.2 short-telephoto that stands apart from the rest of the Leitz Thalia 65 set: its optical design revives the 1935 Leica Thambar, giving a dreamy, romantic, slightly hazy softness wide open that evokes old-Hollywood portraiture. Stopped down it grows progressively sharper and more modern, so a single lens spans a glamorous soft look and a cleaner one. It shares the set's large-format coverage, warm natural skin tones and the always-round 15-blade iris for a characterful bokeh. PL and LPL swappable mounts with /i metadata, a 95mm front and matched gears keep it consistent with the rest of the set.

lenses.description: The wider of the two LEITZ ZOOM full-frame cine zooms, holding a constant T2.8 across the range with no ramping, so lighting and exposure stay put from a master to a close-up. Its parfocal design holds focus through the zoom, allowing in-shot zoom pulls, with virtually no breathing or image shift and exceptionally low distortion. Colour-matched to the Leitz primes, it intercuts seamlessly with the Summilux-C, Summicron-C and Thalia sets, delivering edge-to-edge illumination and resolution on sensors up to VistaVision. A 15-blade clickless iris renders round, natural bokeh, on swappable PL or LPL mounts with /i metadata and a 114mm front.

lenses.description: The longer of the two LEITZ ZOOM full-frame cine zooms, holding a constant T2.8 across the range with no ramping, reaching from a standard view into telephoto compression without touching lighting or exposure. Its parfocal design holds focus through the zoom for clean in-shot zoom pulls, with virtually no breathing or image shift and exceptionally low distortion. Colour-matched to the Leitz primes, it intercuts seamlessly with the Summilux-C, Summicron-C and Thalia sets, with edge-to-edge illumination and resolution on sensors up to VistaVision. A 15-blade clickless iris renders round, natural bokeh, on swappable PL or LPL mounts with /i metadata; ring positions and size match its 25-75mm companion for fast swaps.
